workflow: ChatGPT image generation + manual background removal
goal: maximize tower and enemy recognition through silhouette, palette, and role-specific shape language
retry_note: If the result still looks like generic gray machinery or resembles another unit, retry with this sentence appended: push the signature silhouette much harder, increase the amount of visible signature color panels, reduce generic gray metal, and make it instantly recognizable at thumbnail size.
tower_style_guide: isometric 3/4 top-down cyberpunk tower defense game asset, premium mobile game concept art, SF future city defense technology, prioritize iconic silhouette and large readable color blocking over micro-detail, each tower must look distinct at thumbnail size, single subject, centered composition, full tower visible, enough empty margin, simple light neutral studio background, no environment, no floor, minimal shadow, no smoke, no loose particles, no debris, no text, no logo, no watermark
enemy_style_guide: full-body three-quarter view hostile AI enemy concept art for a cyberpunk tower defense game, premium mobile game concept art, AI invader design, prioritize iconic body plan and large readable color blocking over micro-detail, each enemy must look distinct at thumbnail size, single subject, centered composition, full body visible, enough empty margin, simple light neutral studio background, no environment, no floor, minimal shadow, no smoke, no loose particles, no debris, no text, no logo, no watermark
